coverage.osmApi: Can return raw primitives but requires heavy tiling at this extent.
coverage.overpass: Supports direct thematic extraction for water tags.

queryPracticality.osmApi: No thematic tag-filtered extraction equivalent to Overpass QL for map reads; requires broad fetch + local filtering.
queryPracticality.overpass: Server-side thematic filters reduce payload and simplify ingestion.

rateLimitAndPolicyFit.osmApi: Policy states Editing API is for editing, not read-only projects; large/frequent users should use planet/extract alternatives.
rateLimitAndPolicyFit.overpass: Read-only extraction API intended for query use, but with instance-specific limits.

cacheability.osmApi: Cacheable but expensive cache misses due to high request fan-out and large unfiltered data volume.
cacheability.overpass: Cacheable with lower fan-out and better thematic payload targeting.
